zh.sloganSub:
专注工控机、云终端、边缘计算设备研发制造
提供国产自主可控与X86全平台解决方案
zh.sloganSubEn:
Specializing in industrial computers, cloud terminals & edge computing
Domestic & X86 full-platform solutions
zh.aboutText1: 深圳市原基科技有限公司是一家专注于工控机、云终端、边缘计算设备研发、生产与销售的高新技术企业。公司拥有自主知识产权的产品线，覆盖X86平台和国产自主可控平台，产品广泛应用于教育、医疗、金融、交通、制造等行业，为客户提供从硬件到软件的完整解决方案。
zh.aboutText2: 公司坐落于深圳市光明区云智科园，拥有专业的研发团队和完善的生产体系，已通过ISO 9001质量管理体系认证，荣获多项国家发明专利、实用新型专利及软件著作权，致力于成为行业领先的智能商业技术软硬件一体化方案提供商。
zh.aboutTitle1: 高新技术企业 · 专精特新
zh.trademarkText1: 原基科技、EasyBase 及其相关标识均为深圳市原基科技有限公司的注册商标或正在申请中的商标。
zh.trademarkText2: 本网站所提及的其他公司名称、产品名称、品牌和标识均为其各自所有者的商标或注册商标。未经深圳市原基科技有限公司或相关权利人书面许可，任何单位和个人不得以任何方式使用上述商标。
zh.trademarkText3: 本网站所载内容（包括但不限于文字、图片、音频、视频、图表、标识、版面设计等）均受《中华人民共和国著作权法》及相关法律法规保护。未经书面许可，不得转载、摘编或使用。

historyItems.text: 公司成立，落户深圳光明区云智科园，推出首款云终端产品
产品线扩展至边缘计算、工业控制领域，推出多款国产平台产品
与英特尔联合举办智算产品发布会，产品线扩展至AI服务器
推出飞腾D3000、兆芯KX-7000等新一代国产平台产品
亮相第87届中国教育装备展、第64届中国高等教育博览会

en.sloganSub:
Specializing in industrial computers, cloud terminals & edge computing
Domestic & X86 full-platform solutions
en.sloganSubEn:
Specializing in industrial computers, cloud terminals & edge computing
Domestic & X86 full-platform solutions
en.aboutText1: Shenzhen EasyBase Technology Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing and sales of industrial computers, cloud terminals and edge computing devices. With proprietary product lines covering both X86 and domestic platforms, our products are widely used in education, healthcare, finance, transportation and manufacturing industries, delivering complete hardware-to-software solutions.
en.aboutText2: Headquartered in Yunzhi Science Park, Guangming District, Shenzhen, we have a professional R&D team and complete production system. ISO 9001 certified, we hold numerous national invention patents, utility model patents and software copyrights. We are committed to becoming a leading provider of integrated intelligent business hardware and software solutions.
en.trademarkText1: 原基科技, EasyBase and related logos are registered trademarks or pending trademarks of Shenzhen EasyBase Technology Co., Ltd.
en.trademarkText2: Other company names, product names, brands and logos mentioned on this website are trademarks or registered trademarks of their respective owners. Unauthorized use of the above trademarks is prohibited without written permission.
en.trademarkText3: All content on this website (including but not limited to text, images, audio, video, charts, logos, layouts) is protected by copyright laws. Reproduction or use without written permission is prohibited.

historyItems.text: Company founded in Yunzhi Science Park, Shenzhen. Launched first cloud terminal product.
Expanded into edge computing and industrial control. Released multiple domestic platform products.
Co-hosted AI computing product launch with Intel. Entered the AI server market.
Released next-gen domestic platform products: Phytium D3000, Zhaoxin KX-7000.
Exhibited at the 87th China Education Equipment Expo & 64th China Higher Education Expo.
